parrafos:
Professional 3D Generalist specializing in Character Art and stylized visual development. I work across the full 3D production pipeline, from modeling and texturing to rigging, animation, and final presentation, combining artistic creativity with technical precision.
Proficient in Blender, Autodesk Maya, Substance Painter, Substance Painter and Clip Studio Paint.
I enjoy creating expressive, production-ready characters with a strong focus on appealing design, clean topology, and efficient workflows.
I am passionate about bringing characters to life through every stage of the process, crafting assets that are both visually engaging and technically optimized for games and animation.
